name: Chewy Oatmeal Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Rolled oats (raw, quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Quaker Oatmeal Boxtop
Preparation Time: 0:30
2. Lightly grease the cookie sheet with shortening.
3. In a large bowl, combine the shortening and brown sugar. Beat in the egg, milk, and vanilla extract until well blended.
4. Gradually add the oats, flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon to the shortening mixture. Mix until just combined.
5. Fold in the dried raisins and chopped walnuts.
6. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto the prepared cookie sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
7. Bake for 10-13 minutes, or until lightly browned. Allow cookies to cool on a wire rack for 2 minutes before removing from the oven.
